name: Sect House
short_description: Indie Horror in which you play as a child whose once-happy life is shattered after your how your parents gave you to a cult by a pastor. Trapped in a nightmarish home, you must explore environments, solve eerie puzzles, and without falling into the hands of the pastor. Can you escape the house?
detailed_description:
Sect House is a survival horror game with psychological elements and mind-bending puzzles. You play as a child whose once-happy life is shattered after your parents join a sinister cult led by a monstrous pastor. Trapped in a nightmarish home, you must explore shifting environments, solve eerie puzzles, and without falling into the hands of the pastor. Can you escape the house?

Explore locations and move along the plot. Look for objects and solve puzzles in the game to move on and escape from the house.

Game Features:

  • Game Story

  • Two endings of the game

  • Three puzzles

  • Item selection

  • Various locations

supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Latin America, Simplified Chinese, Russian
